## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issue

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📝 Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] I've matched the existing code style
- [ ] I've updated docs where behavior changed
- [ ] My PR is focused on a single logical change
